response.justification: Candidate has 16+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience and some technical leadership signals (workshops, courses, OSS project leadership), but the resume shows no formal people-management experience, no Engineering Manager titles, and no demonstrated work on developer tools, build systems, or testing infrastructure at scale. Mobile-platform ecosystem experience is also minimal (some iOS/Apple TV work years ago). The role explicitly requires 2+ years of direct people management and 3+ years building developer tools, which are not evidenced.
strengths: 16+ years of broad software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and backend
Strong testing/TDD culture, with workshops on Selenium, TDD, and authored test tooling (Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Founder/maintainer of open source platform (GISCollective) showing ownership and roadmap thinking
concerns: No formal people-management or Engineering Manager experience listed
Lacks the required 3 years building developer tools / build systems / test automation as a primary focus
Limited recent mobile-platform ecosystem experience for a role centered on mobile developer productivity
